content.question: What is the causal contribution of the January 2020 school-readiness rule change (restricting deferral) to the observed rise in SNI identification, versus contribution from other sources such as improved diagnostic methods, increased referral sensitivity, or genuine prevalence increase?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a quasi-experimental impact evaluation comparing SNI identification trends in cohorts that entered school before and after the January 2020 rule change, while controlling for changes in diagnostic instrumentation and referral protocols over the same period.
